title: Charred Cozy Vietnamese Pecorino Ban Xeo
description: Crispy and charred Vietnamese crepe with a hint of pecorino and a variety of delicious fillings.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, coconut milk, water, salt, and black pepper to form a smooth batter.
Let the batter rest for 30 minutes to allow the flour to absorb the liquid.
Heat a small non-stick pan over medium-high heat.
Brush the pan with 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil.
Pour 1/4 cup of the batter into the pan and tilt the pan to evenly coat the bottom.
Cook for 2 minutes or until the edges start to curl and the surface is dry.
Add the grated pecorino cheese, shredded carrots, bean sprouts, and chopped scallions to one half of the crepe.
Fold the other half of the crepe over the fillings to form a half-moon shape.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes or until the cheese is melted and the crepe is crispy.
Slide the crepe out of the pan onto a plate and repeat with the remaining batter and fillings.
Serve the charred cozy Vietnamese pecorino ban xeo hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
